site.title: Speedy Campaign Sites
site.metaDescription: Professional campaign websites built fast. Fixed pricing, mobile-friendly, ready in days — not weeks. Templates designed for local and state races.

hero.headline: Your Campaign Deserves a Website That Works as Hard as You Do
hero.subheadline: Professional, mobile-friendly campaign websites built in days — not weeks. Fixed pricing. No surprises.

valueProp.title: Why Speedy Campaign Sites?
valueProp.subtitle: We build websites for candidates who need to hit the ground running.

features.title: Fast Turnaround
features.description: Your site goes live in days, not weeks. We know campaigns run on tight timelines.

features.title: Mobile-First
features.description: Most voters browse on their phones. Every template is built mobile-friendly.

features.title: Fixed Pricing
features.description: One price, no hourly billing, no scope creep. You know the cost before we start.

features.title: Built for Local Races
features.description: Designed specifically for city council, school board, county, and state legislative races.

features.title: Your Message, Your Words
features.description: You provide the content and messaging. We build the site around your platform — we don't write it.

features.title: Easy to Update
features.description: Need to add an event or endorsement? Simple content updates keep your site current through election day.

templates.name: Single Page Hero
templates.description: Everything on one scrolling page. Perfect for first-time candidates who want a clean, simple presence.

templates.name: Multi-Page Hero
templates.description: Dedicated pages for issues, endorsements, events, and more. Ideal for candidates with a detailed platform.

templates.name: Bold Hero
templates.description: A striking full-screen hero image with bold typography. Makes a strong first impression.

templates.name: Clean Minimal
templates.description: Understated elegance with clean lines and plenty of whitespace. Lets your message breathe.

templates.name: Community Focus
templates.description: Warm, approachable design centered on community connection and grassroots engagement.

portfolio.title: Our Work
portfolio.subtitle: Campaigns we've helped launch online.
portfolio.emptyMessage: Portfolio coming soon — we're currently building sites for campaigns across the state. Check back for live examples!

contact.title: Ready to Launch Your Campaign Site?
contact.subtitle: Get in touch and we'll have your site live in days.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Two options. No hidden fees. Pick the plan that fits your campaign.

tiers.name: Self-Hosted
tiers.description: We build it, you host it. Perfect for campaigns with technical volunteers.
includes: Custom campaign website from any template
All source files delivered to you

tiers.name: Managed
tiers.description: We build it, host it, and keep it running. You focus on the campaign.
excludes: Domain registration (we'll help you pick one)

pricing.disclaimer: All campaign content — including issue positions, biography, endorsements, and messaging — must be provided by the campaign. Speedy Campaign Sites builds and maintains the technical website only. We do not author, endorse, or take responsibility for any political content or messaging displayed on sites we build.

faq.question: What do I need to provide?
faq.answer: Your campaign provides all text content (bio, issues, endorsements), photos, and any specific design preferences. We handle everything technical — building the site, making it responsive, and getting it online.

faq.question: How fast can my site be live?
faq.answer: Most sites launch within 3–5 business days after we receive your content. If you have your materials ready, we can often move faster.

faq.question: Can I switch templates later?
faq.answer: Yes! Since all content lives in a structured data file, we can re-skin your site with a different template. For Managed plans, this is included. For Self-Hosted, a small fee may apply.

faq.question: Do you write my campaign's issue positions or messaging?
faq.answer: No. We are a web development service only. Your campaign is responsible for all political content and messaging. We build the website to present your content professionally.

faq.question: What happens after the election?
faq.answer: For Self-Hosted plans, the site is yours to keep or take down. For Managed plans, you can cancel the monthly hosting at any time — we'll help you export your site files if you'd like to keep them.

faq.question: Can I update the site myself?
faq.answer: Yes! Every site is built with plain HTML — no databases, no CMS logins, no complicated systems. If you're comfortable editing an HTML file, you can make changes directly. On Managed plans, just email us your updates and we'll handle it for you.

footer.legal: Speedy Campaign Sites is a web development service. We do not author, endorse, or take responsibility for any political content displayed on websites we build.
